label: Effect Direction
description: Canonical direction of estimated effect or recommendation impact.
usageNotes: Use at statement level and outcome-link level.
`mixed` is allowed when benefits and harms differ materially across outcomes or subgroups.

entries.label: Benefit
entries.description: Net expected effect is beneficial for the intended target.

entries.label: Harm
entries.description: Net expected effect is harmful or risk-increasing.
usageNotes: Should commonly map to avoid/de-escalate decisions.

entries.label: No Benefit
entries.description: No meaningful benefit demonstrated compared with comparator or standard care.
usageNotes: Distinct from harm because it may be neutral rather than detrimental.

entries.label: Inconclusive
entries.description: Available evidence is insufficient to determine direction reliably.

entries.label: Mixed
entries.description: Evidence shows heterogeneous direction across outcomes, populations or contexts.
usageNotes: Use when simplification to a single polarity would be misleading.
